source_pr.title: planner: add mpp,join cases covering cascades mode
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #62328

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in PR; this PR is primarily casetest coverage/refactor for cascades mode.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in PR; this PR is primarily casetest coverage/refactor for cascades mode.
root_cause_explanation: insufficient_evidence: This PR mainly ports/adds planner casetest coverage under cascades mode and adds new xut testdata files. The patch does not show a specific flaky symptom and a targeted stabilization fix, so we avoid guessing a root cause.
fix_pattern: Port planner casetests (mpp/join suites) to run under cascades mode and add xut testdata files.

evidence: evidence: testKit.MustQuery("select * from t1 where exists (select 1 from t2 where t1.col0 = t2.col0) order by t1.col0, t1.col1;").Check(result) (pkg/planner/core/casetest/join/join_test.go)

Triage summary: testKit.MustQuery("select * from t1 where exists (select 1 from t2 where t1.col0 = t2.col0) order by t1.col0, t1.col1;").Check(result) (pkg/planner/core/casetest/join/join_test.go)
Changed files (5): pkg/planner/core/casetest/join/join_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/logicalplan/logical_plan_builder_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/mpp/main_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/mpp/mpp_test.go, pkg/planner/core/casetest/mpp/testdata/integration_suite_xut.json
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
